faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Rosebank homes?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Rosebank properties take 1-2 hours depending on the extent of the infestation and number of drains affected. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and insecticides, and provide prevention recommendations to keep drain flies from returning.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Rosebank properties?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems common in both older Rosebank homes and newer buildings. Moisture accumulation, slow-draining sinks, rarely used bathrooms, and basement drains provide ideal breeding grounds. Rosebank's humid coastal climate can exacerbate these conditions, making professional treatment essential.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my Rosebank home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use family-safe and pet-friendly products specifically formulated for residential drain fly treatment. Our methods include bio-enzymatic drain cleaners that break down organic matter and targeted applications of low-toxicity insecticides. We follow all EPA guidelines and provide clear instructions for any temporary precautions needed after treatment.
